name: Yantai Dongcheng Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yantai Dongcheng Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and sale of biochemical API products in China. It offers heparin, chondroitin sulphate, and glucosamine series products, as well as marine collagen, hyaluronic acid, heparinoid, and cytochrome C for use in the therapeutic areas of cardiovascular, oncology, orthopaedics, anti-infection, etc. The company also exports its products to approximately 50 countries and regions, including the United States, Germany, Austria, Japan, etc. Yantai Dongcheng Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Yantai, China.
